rule_text: Before confirmatory freeze, select one global fixed comparator FIXED* from {SCAT32, LBLOB16, MATCH1} using the six development images only. The selection score is the median fixed-dwell radiometric PSNR at (rho=0.60, nu=2000), averaged over development seeds. Tie within 0.05 dB is resolved in order SCAT32 -> LBLOB16 -> MATCH1, favoring the least scene-dependent rule. [ROUND63_GPT_ROUND10_RULING_RAW.md Sec 7 / line 801]
